name: Situ Nan Mentorship
description: Situ Nan takes Wang Lin as a disciple, granting him the path of restriction and profound guidance.
_comment: Karmic Nexus node: Situ Nan Mentorship. Per architectural review: RI is a novel about karma. karmic_weight is signed (+ = debt owed TO bearer, - = grudge held BY bearer). Prime Directive: unresolved karma persists objectively until paid.
